// Fixture for type-safety-bypasses rule.

export function unsafeCast(input: unknown) {
  return (input as any).foo;
}

export function doubleCast(input: unknown) {
  return input as unknown as { id: number };
}

// @ts-ignore
const broken: number = "string-but-ignored";

// @ts-expect-error
const alsoBroken: number = "string-but-expected";

export function badAnnotation(x: any) {
  return x.whatever;
}
